body:
Title: CRA Form GST370 2025 Employee and Partner GST/HST Rebate Application.

Source:
- https://www.canada.ca/content/dam/cra-arc/formspubs/pbg/gst370/gst370-25e.pdf

CRA Form GST370 2025 calculates the employee and partner GST/HST rebate. Part B line 3 adds eligible expenses other than capital cost allowance on which GST was paid and eligible CCA on motor vehicles, musical instruments, and aircraft for which GST was paid. Line 4 multiplies line 3 by 5/105.

For HST expenses, Part B line 7 adds eligible expenses other than CCA and eligible CCA in each of the 13%, 14%, and 15% HST columns. Line 8 adds the three line 7 column totals. Lines 9, 10, and 11 multiply the 13%, 14%, and 15% line 7 column totals by 13/113, 14/114, and 15/115. Line 12 adds lines 9, 10, and 11.

Chart 3 calculates the rebate for property and services brought into a participating province when the provincial part of HST was paid separately. Chart 3 line 3 adds eligible expenses other than CCA and eligible CCA in each 1%, 2%, 8%, 9%, and 10% provincial HST column. Chart 3 line 4, entered on Part B line 13, adds all Chart 3 line 3 column totals. Chart 3 lines 5 through 9 multiply the column totals by 1/101, 2/102, 8/108, 9/109, and 10/110. Chart 3 line 10, entered on Part B line 14, adds Chart 3 lines 5 through 9. Part B line 15 adds lines 4, 12, and 14 and is entered on line 45700 of the income tax and benefit return.

Numeric grounding: GST370 line 4 rate is 5/105. GST370 lines 9, 10, and 11 rates are 13/113, 14/114, and 15/115. GST370 Chart 3 lines 5 through 9 rates are 1/101, 2/102, 8/108, 9/109, and 10/110.
